name: codex-project-memory
description: Local project memory with structured review, source citations, and a guide-first offline knowledge graph.

interface.shortDescription: Private, traceable long-term memory for each Codex project.
interface.longDescription: Keep project decisions, verified conclusions, workflows, and evidence in a private local store outside Git. Review what is saved, detect stale source files, allow explicit one-way cross-project reads, and explore knowledge through a guide-first offline workspace.
defaultPrompt: Load this project's saved memory and flag anything stale.
Propose durable memories from the work we just finished.
Guide me through this project's saved knowledge and evidence.
